text:
L.117-328) requires that beginning in CY 2024, there will be a separate 
payment amount for an applicable dNPWT device only and does not 
include payment for the nursing and therapy services. Payment for the 
device is equal to the supply price used to determine the relative value for 
the service under the Medicare Physician Fee Schedule (as of January 1, 
2022) for the applicable disposable device and updated by the consumer 
price index for all urban consumers minus the productivity
